activities.name: The Bund
activities.tips: 🌧️ Rain expected - bring an umbrella and waterproof jacket | 💡 Extremely crowded in the evening for light shows. Visit early morning for a peaceful walk.

activities.name: Yu Garden & Bazaar
activities.tips: 🌧️ Rain expected - bring an umbrella and waterproof jacket | 💡 Weekends are packed. Go on a weekday morning to enjoy the garden calmly.

activities.name: Shanghai Museum
activities.tips: 🌧️ Rain expected - bring an umbrella and waterproof jacket | 💡 Free tickets are limited. Book online in advance to avoid long queues.

activities.name: Shanghai Tower & Observation Deck
activities.tips: 💡 Lines for the elevator can be over an hour. Purchase tickets online for a slight time advantage. | 🕐 Open: 08:30-22:00

activities.name: Tianzifang
activities.tips: 💡 Narrow lanes get congested easily. Evenings and weekends are very busy. | 🕐 Open: Most shops 10:00-22:00

activities.name: Zhujiajiao Water Town
activities.tips: 💡 A popular day trip. Arrive early to beat the tour groups and enjoy the canals in relative quiet. | 🕐 Open: 08:30-16:30 (main sights)

activities.name: Former French Concession (Wukang Road Area)
activities.tips: 💡 Weekend afternoons are busy with cafes and photo-takers. A weekday stroll is more relaxed. | 🕐 Open: 24/7 (area)
